module_sme_rollup.name: Product Definition & Engineering
module_sme_rollup.description: Maintain accurate, versioned product specifications with full traceability of engineering changes.

statements.text: Define multi-level BOMs with components, quantities, alternates, and effectivity dates.
statements.rationale: Foundation for accurate costing and material planning

statements.text: Document routings with ordered operations, work centers, times, and resource requirements.
statements.rationale: Enables scheduling, capacity planning, and labour tracking

statements.text: Manage engineering changes through formal approval with impact assessment on BOMs and routings.
statements.rationale: Prevents uncontrolled product changes and production disruptions

statements.text: Maintain product item master with revision history, documents, and lifecycle stage control.
statements.rationale: Single source of truth for product data across organization

statements.text: Support recipes and formulas for process manufacturing with batch scaling and yield tracking.
statements.rationale: Enables batch and process-based production modes

module_sme_rollup.name: Demand & Supply Planning
module_sme_rollup.description: Forecast demand accurately and generate material and production plans to meet it efficiently.

statements.text: Generate statistical forecasts at item, family, and region levels with accuracy metrics.
statements.rationale: Reduces stockouts and excess inventory through data-driven planning

statements.text: Explode multi-level BOMs and net requirements against inventory to generate planned orders.
statements.rationale: Ensures material availability without overstocking

statements.text: Apply lot-sizing, safety stock, and reorder-point policies with exception messaging.
statements.rationale: Optimizes order quantities and buffers demand variability

statements.text: Perform rough-cut capacity planning against critical resources to validate feasibility.
statements.rationale: Identifies bottlenecks before detailed scheduling

statements.text: Support Sales & Operations Planning cycle with demand, supply, and consensus phases.
statements.rationale: Aligns sales, operations, and finance on production targets

module_sme_rollup.name: Production Execution & Shop Floor Control
module_sme_rollup.description: Execute production efficiently with real-time visibility, material control, and quality assurance.

statements.text: Create work orders from sales orders or schedule; automatically reserve and issue BOM components.
statements.rationale: Prevents material shortages and ensures correct component allocation

statements.text: Schedule work orders with infinite or finite capacity modes; display load and bottlenecks visually.
statements.rationale: Optimizes resource utilization and identifies constraints

statements.text: Provide operator interface on mobile or tablet to display work instructions and capture operation events.
statements.rationale: Enables real-time shop floor control and data accuracy

statements.text: Capture barcode and lot/serial scanning for material traceability and consumption tracking.
statements.rationale: Ensures accurate inventory and enables genealogy traceability

statements.text: Record labour time, scrap, rework, and downtime with reason codes per work order.
statements.rationale: Enables cost tracking, variance analysis, and root-cause investigation

statements.text: Automatically consume materials and update inventory when work orders complete.
statements.rationale: Maintains accurate inventory and work-in-progress balances

module_sme_rollup.name: Quality, Compliance & Traceability
module_sme_rollup.description: Ensure product quality, regulatory compliance, and full traceability from materials to customer.

statements.text: Define and execute inspection plans with incoming, in-process, and final quality checks.
statements.rationale: Prevents defective products from reaching customers

statements.text: Capture quality measurements from manual or automated equipment with specification alerts.
statements.rationale: Enables real-time quality control and process improvement

statements.text: Record non-conformances with cause codes and manage corrective/preventive actions to closure.
statements.rationale: Drives continuous improvement and prevents recurrence

statements.text: Track lot and serial numbers forward to customer and backward to raw materials.
statements.rationale: Enables rapid recall and root-cause analysis

statements.text: Flag hazardous materials with safety data sheets and enforce PPE and certification requirements.
statements.rationale: Protects worker safety and ensures regulatory compliance

statements.text: Generate certificates of analysis and conformance for customer or regulatory submission.
statements.rationale: Demonstrates compliance and supports customer audits

module_sme_rollup.name: Cost Management & Performance Analytics
module_sme_rollup.description: Track costs accurately and measure manufacturing performance against targets.

statements.text: Calculate standard cost from material, labour, and overhead; roll up to finished goods.
statements.rationale: Provides baseline for variance analysis and product profitability

statements.text: Roll up actual costs from work orders and decompose variances by category.
statements.rationale: Identifies cost drivers and enables corrective action

statements.text: Calculate OEE from availability, performance, and quality; display real-time dashboards.
statements.rationale: Measures equipment effectiveness and guides improvement priorities

statements.text: Analyze downtime by reason and track throughput, yield, and scrap by line and shift.
statements.rationale: Identifies bottlenecks and quality issues for targeted improvement

statements.text: Assign energy and utility costs to work orders and track carbon emissions per unit.
statements.rationale: Supports sustainability reporting and cost allocation

module_sme_rollup.name: System Integration & Governance
module_sme_rollup.description: Secure data, control access, and integrate with enterprise systems.

statements.text: Implement role-based access control with individual user accounts and audit logging.
statements.rationale: Prevents unauthorized access and ensures accountability

statements.text: Encrypt data at rest and in transit; maintain audit trail of all access and modifications.
statements.rationale: Protects sensitive production and quality data

statements.text: Import and export production data via CSV, Excel, or API; integrate with ERP and accounting systems.
statements.rationale: Enables data flow across enterprise and reduces manual entry

statements.text: Provide web-based access on mobile and desktop devices with responsive interface.
statements.rationale: Enables remote access and real-time decision-making

statements.text: Link work centers to maintenance assets; automatically create maintenance requests from downtime.
statements.rationale: Coordinates production and maintenance scheduling

Platform & Data.narrative: This family ensures your manufacturing data is accessible, secure, and connected to your other business systems. Singapore SMEs need this foundation to comply with data protection regulations, enable your team to work from anywhere, and integrate with accounting or supply chain tools. For example, a contract manufacturer can securely share production data with customers via mobile access, or automatically sync completed work orders to your accounting system.

Product Engineering.narrative: This family captures and manages the technical blueprint of what you make—the components, assembly steps, and how designs evolve over time. SMEs rely on this to avoid costly mistakes, respond quickly to customer or regulatory changes, and maintain consistency across production runs. A precision-parts maker, for instance, uses this to track design revisions when a customer requests a modification, ensuring all work orders reflect the latest approved specification.

Production Execution.narrative: This family turns your engineering plans into real production activity—scheduling work, guiding operators on the shop floor, and capturing what actually happened. SMEs need this to meet delivery dates, reduce waste, and see real-time progress instead of relying on manual updates. A food-packaging SME uses this to schedule production runs across multiple lines, track material consumption in real time, and quickly spot bottlenecks before they delay shipments.

Quality & Compliance.narrative: This family embeds quality checks and traceability into every step of manufacturing, and ensures you meet safety and environmental rules. Singapore SMEs face strict regulatory expectations and customer audits, making this critical for reputation and legal compliance. A medical-device contract manufacturer uses this to record every inspection result and trace any defective batch back to its raw materials and production date, essential for recalls and customer confidence.

Planning & Costing.narrative: This family forecasts demand, calculates what materials and capacity you need, tracks inventory through production, and tells you the true cost of each product. SMEs depend on this to avoid stockouts or excess inventory, price competitively, and understand profitability by product or customer. An electronics assembler uses this to forecast component needs three months ahead, avoid rush orders, and see that a high-volume customer order is actually less profitable than a smaller specialty job.

Maintenance & Analytics.narrative: This family monitors equipment health, measures manufacturing efficiency (OEE), and handles products that need rework or repair. SMEs use this to prevent unexpected downtime, identify where time and material are being lost, and manage the cost of quality failures. A precision-machining SME tracks machine availability and performance metrics to spot when a tool is wearing out before it ruins a batch, and quickly reworks any parts that fail inspection.
